name: gui-starter
summary: Desktop/GUI application shell: an app entrypoint + a visual-inspection hook, ready for the design-language UX tier.
post-apply-notes: Pick the language variant matching the project; quick-start-template applies that variant's test/build/lint/typecheck commands into the CLAUDE.md commands table + the v1.26 code-quality block (not edited inline). Starter payload: README.md + an app-shell stub; pairs with design-language-adapt + ux-demo-build. Config defaults are applied via model-effort-profile-switch + workflow-variant-switch.
